command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'
echo "Workflow started. Hooks are now active."

# Check parent state
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
  [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue
  jq -c '{cursor: .cursor, status: .status, teammates: [.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {n:.key, s:.value.status}]}' "$f"
done
echo "---"
# Check worker state files
echo "Worker state files: $(ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | grep -v "a38f8f03" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"

# Get parent session_id
PARENT_SID=$(jq -r '.owner_session_id' .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1)
echo "Parent session: $PARENT_SID"

# Test TeammateIdle for worker-1 
echo "{\"session_id\":\"$PARENT_SID\",\"agent_id\":\"worker-1@test-static-team\"}" | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/teammate-idle.sh 2>&1
echo "---"
# Check parent 
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
  [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue
  jq -c '.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {n:.key, s:.value.status}' "$f"
done

# Check hook registration
cat ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/hooks.json | jq '.hooks.TeammateIdle'
echo "---"
# Check if the hook file exists and is executable
ls -la ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/teammate-idle.sh
cat /tmp/teammate-idle-debug.json 2>/dev/null | jq '.' || echo "No debug file — hook didn't fire"

# Check if TeammateIdle detected completion
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
  [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue
  jq -c '{cursor: .cursor, teammates: [.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {n:.key, s:.value.status}]}' "$f"
done

steps.output:
## Static Team Test Results

Summary:
null
null

Collected outputs:
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/output.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/haiku.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/result.md

command_log.command: echo '## Static Team Test Results' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/team-test/summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.completed_count, .failed_count' && echo '' && echo 'Collected outputs:' && find .wheel/outputs/team-test/results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
